findings.text: OCR confidence is low (0.65) with multiple errors: 'Accommogaton' should be 'Accommodation', 'Sghi Camgs' likely 'Edinburgh', 'Sioniin ceir' likely 'Scotland', 'Il' likely 'EH11 4SN', 'accommi' likely 'accommodation', 'Unive' should be 'University', 'ha' should be 'have', 'Edinb' should be 'Edinburgh', 'Hol' should be 'House', 'date. i' likely 'that date.'
The document appears to be a Notice to Quit from Edinburgh Napier University to student Anfal Elbushra, dated 20 April 2026, citing breach of Clause 2 of the Tenancy Agreement.

Tesseract OCR confidence is 0.65 with numerous errors (e.g., 'Accommogaton', 'Sghi Camgs', 'Sioniin ceir', 'Il'). The corrected text is proposed as a candidate artifact. No legal findings are made; the task is limited to text correction.
